conbody.p: The system uses a hybrid storage model combining structured JSON artifacts with a FAISS vector index.

section.title: Storage Components
section.p: The following data artifacts are used at runtime:
Contains all chunked content used for retrieval.
Embeddings are not stored in this file.
Stores document relationships as an adjacency map.
This graph is used during retrieval for document-level context expansion.
Contains vector embeddings generated from chunk content.

ul.li: Queried using approximate nearest neighbor search

section.title: Design Rationale
section.p: This storage model provides several advantages:

ul.li: avoids duplication of embedding data in JSON
enables fast similarity search via FAISS
supports modular updates to content and index

ol.li: indices are mapped to entries in chunks.json
chunk data is used for scoring, ranking, and grouping
knowledge_graph.json is used for context expansion

section.title: Capacity Considerations
section.p: The system is designed for portfolio-scale datasets.
This avoids the need for external vector databases while maintaining fast retrieval performance.
